creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
Update hastymail to latest version hastymail2 1.1
http://www.hastymail.org/

Original port is not maintained, and is ancient....
I suggest to replace it with my port, which installs hastymail2 (I also renamed portname to hastymail2)

Because version for hastymail2 is 1.1 (1.01 as authors say) I set PORTEPOCH



This also means, that I'm willing to become maintainer of this port :)


Hope you'll like it

P.S.
I changed pkg-descr, to new quite longer one... which is much more descriptive.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
